zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac於大約1331年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特提爾包格時，他的父親Arnoud Berthout Bac38歲，母親Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa58歲。他與Lijsbeth van Mieren結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1378年在他的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac于大约1331年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特提爾包格时，他的父亲Arnoud Berthout Bac38岁，母亲Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa58岁。他与Lijsbeth van Mieren结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1378年在他的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish (also Bać): perhaps a variant of Bacz, from a pet form of the personal name Bartłomiej (see Bartholomew ), occuring in southeastern Poland. Aternatively, it may be a metonymic occupational name derived from baca ‘shepherd’. Compare Batz .
French: from bac ‘tub, trough’, probably applied as a metonymic occupational name or as a topographic name.

variants.name: Bartholomew
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bertilmew, Bertelmy, a borrowing of the Old French form of the Biblical personal name Bartholomew (from Latin Bartholomaeus; Hebrew ‘son of Talmai’, said to mean ‘having many furrows’, i.e. rich in land). This was an extremely popular personal name in Christian Europe, with many vernacular derivatives. It derived its popularity from the apostle Saint Bartholomew (Matthew 10:3), who was, among other things, the patron saint of tanners, vintners, and butlers.
As an Irish name, it has been used as an Anglicized form of Mac Pharthaláin (see McFarlane ).

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Arnoud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac was born about 1331, in Tilburg, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Arnoud Berthout Bac, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa, was 58. He married Lijsbeth van Mieren. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1378, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac est né environ 1331, à Tilburg, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Arnoud Berthout Bac, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa, avait 58 ans. Il a épousé Lijsbeth van Mieren. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1378, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac um 1331 in Tilburg, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnoud Berthout Bac 38 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa 58. Er hat Lijsbeth van Mieren geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1378 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac è nato il circa 1331 nel Tilburg, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Arnoud Berthout Bac, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa, aveva 58 anni. Lui sposato Lijsbeth van Mieren. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1378, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan Arnoud Berthout Bacが約1331年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントティルブルグで生まれた時，父Arnoud Berthout Bacは38歳，母Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aaは58歳であった。Lijsbeth van Mierenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac(이)가 대략 1331년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 틸버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnoud Berthout Bac(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa(은)는 58세였다. 그는 Lijsbeth van Mieren(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Breda, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Breda, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Tilburg, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Tilburg, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac nasceu aproximadamente 1331, em Tilburg, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Arnoud Berthout Bac, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa, tinha 58 anos. Ele casou-se com Lijsbeth van Mieren. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1378, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac родился около 1331 г. в местности тилбург, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Arnoud Berthout Bac было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa, 58. Он женился на женщине по имени Lijsbeth van Mieren. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1378 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac nació aproximadamente 1331, en Tilburg, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Arnoud Berthout Bac, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gerards Van Der Aa, tenía 58 años. Se casó con Lijsbeth van Mieren. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1378, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
